patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73 (multiple source documents). Active problems documented include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative anemia, leg pain, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major recent procedure: COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025 by Haroon, Mustafa, MD. Notable laboratory abnormalities: Iron 41(L) ug/dL and IronSaturation 15(L)% (07/03/2023), Triglycerides 158(H) mg/dL (07/03/2023), VLDLCholesterolCal 32(H) mg/dL (07/03/2023), eGFRCKD-EPI 58(L) ml/min/1.73m2 (07/03/2023), Chloride 108(H) mmol/L (07/03/2023), and anion gap 5.0(L) mmol/L (07/03/2023). Care team includes PCP Hand, Hoyet A, MD and multiple specialty providers (endocrinology, cardiology, surgery). Conflicting demographic and social history elements (DOB, legal sex/gender, smoking history) are preserved in conflicts.
